headline: A Hidden Gas Price Spike Is Coming — and It Has Nothing to Do With Iran
summary: Many investors and drivers breathed a sigh of relief after the 2024 election. President Trump campaigned hard on bringing down energy costs, and the first year of his second term saw gas prices fall sharply from the year before. Then the outbreak of the Iran conflict briefly sent oil above $100 a barrel and pushed ... A Hidden Gas Price Spike Is Coming — and It Has Nothing to Do With Iran
